blended.narrative: Loveland is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,727 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 38".
